{
  "@context": "https://schema.org",
  "@type": "JobPosting",
  "title": "Mobile Developer (React Native)",
  "description": "Vaste Holdings is building a regulated investment and savings platform for the Nigerian retail market &mdash; enabling individuals to onboard, fund a wallet, and access structured investment products through a secure, compliant digital experience.

We are recruiting to fill the position below:

Job Position: Mobile Developer (React Native)
Job Location: Lagos
Employment Type: Full-time

The role


	We are a growing asset management and fintech firm looking for a Cross-Platform Mobile Developer with good years of experience.
	Qualified candidate will build and maintain mobile applications for retail investors, portfolio tracking, and real-time asset management.


Key responsibilities


	Develop and maintain cross-platform mobile apps (iOS &amp; Android) using React Native.
	Build portfolio management dashboards showing asset allocation, returns, risk metrics, and transaction history.
	Integrate REST APIs for user authentication, trade execution, fund transfers, and market data.
	Implement secure storage, biometric login, certificate pinning, and encryption for fintech compliance.
	Optimize performance for large financial datasets (e.g., historical NAVs, price feeds, transaction logs).
	Collaborate in-office 2 days/week with backend engineers, product managers, and QA teams.


Required experience and skills Technical skills


	4-5 years of hands-on of professional mobile development experience.
	Strong proficiency in React Native (TypeScript).
	Proven experience in fintech, asset management, or wealth management (portfolio apps, investment dashboards, trading interfaces).
	Experience with state management (Redux, Bloc, Provider, or MobX).
	Familiarity with financial charts (MPAndroidChart, Victory Native, flchart).
	Knowledge of RESTful APIs, WebSockets (for live prices), and offline data persistence.
	Version control (Git) and CI/CD basics. &bull; Ability to work in a fast?paced but supportive fintech environment. Fintech and regulatory experience
	Working knowledge of SEC Nigeria regulations, fund management, or roboadvisory concepts.
	Experience with Nigerian fintech APIs (Flutterwave, Paystack, or banking gateways).
	Published apps on Google Play Store / Apple App Store.


Method of Application
Interested and qualified candidates should forward their Applications and referrals to: careers@vasteltd.com or matthew.adesina@vasteltd.com using the Position as the subject of the email.

Note


	Candidates should share their CV and a short note covering their most relevant fintech delivery experience.
	Where available, references from previous technical leadership engagements are strongly encouraged.
	Shortlisted candidates will be contacted for an initial conversation with the team.
",
  "datePosted": "2026-05-16",
  "validThrough": "2026-06-05",
  "employmentType": "Full-Time",

    "@type": "Organization",
    "name": ""
    
  },

       "streetAddress": ". ",
      "addressLocality": "Lagos",
      "addressCountry": "NG"
     
      
    }
  },
  "identifier": {
    "@type": "PropertyValue",
    "name": "",
    "value": "199009"
  },
  "baseSalary": {
    "@type": "MonetaryAmount",
    "currency": "NGN",
    "value": {
      "@type": "QuantitativeValue",
      "minValue": 0,
      "maxValue": 0,
      "unitText": "MONTH"
    }
  }
}



Mobile Developer (React Native) Job at Vaste Holdings




        
    

        
        Vaste Holdings is building a regulated investment and savings platform for the Nigerian retail market — enabling individuals to onboard, fund a wallet, and access structured investment products through a secure, compliant digital experience.

We are recruiting to fill the position below:

Job Position: Mobile Developer (React Native)
Job Location: Lagos
Employment Type: Full-time

The role
     

        



     (adsbygoogle = window.adsbygoogle || []).push({});
    
    




	We are a growing asset management and fintech firm looking for a Cross-Platform Mobile Developer with good years of experience.
	Qualified candidate will build and maintain mobile applications for retail investors, portfolio tracking, and real-time asset management.


Key responsibilities


	Develop and maintain cross-platform mobile apps (iOS & Android) using React Native.
	Build portfolio management dashboards showing asset allocation, returns, risk metrics, and transaction history.
	Integrate REST APIs for user authentication, trade execution, fund transfers, and market data.
	Implement secure storage, biometric login, certificate pinning, and encryption for fintech compliance.
	Optimize performance for large financial datasets (e.g., historical NAVs, price feeds, transaction logs).
	Collaborate in-office 2 days/week with backend engineers, product managers, and QA teams.


Required experience and skills Technical skills


	4-5 years of hands-on of professional mobile development experience.
	Strong proficiency in React Native (TypeScript).
	Proven experience in fintech, asset management, or wealth management (portfolio apps, investment dashboards, trading interfaces).
	Experience with state management (Redux, Bloc, Provider, or MobX).
	Familiarity with financial charts (MPAndroidChart, Victory Native, flchart).
	Knowledge of RESTful APIs, WebSockets (for live prices), and offline data persistence.
	Version control (Git) and CI/CD basics. • Ability to work in a fast?paced but supportive fintech environment. Fintech and regulatory experience
	Working knowledge of SEC Nigeria regulations, fund management, or roboadvisory concepts.
	Experience with Nigerian fintech APIs (Flutterwave, Paystack, or banking gateways).
	Published apps on Google Play Store / Apple App Store.


Method of Application
Interested and qualified candidates should forward their Applications and referrals to: [email protected] or [email protected] using the Position as the subject of the email.

Note


	Candidates should share their CV and a short note covering their most relevant fintech delivery experience.
	Where available, references from previous technical leadership engagements are strongly encouraged.
	Shortlisted candidates will be contacted for an initial conversation with the team.
    

    

        Click here to Apply

{
  "@context": "https://schema.org",
  "@type": "JobPosting",
  "title": "Relationship Officer",
  "description": "Baselenders Limited is a Lagos-based licensed money lender regulated by the Lagos State Government. We provide fast, responsible, and professionally structured credit to SMEs, professionals, and individuals across Lagos State.

We are recruiting to fill the position below:

Job Position: Relationship Officer

Job Location: Lagos
Employment Type: Full-time

Summary


	We are looking for smart, energetic, and result-driven Relationship Officers to join our growing team.
	If you are passionate about sales, relationship management, and earning based on performance, this opportunity is for you.


Key Responsibilities


	Generate and convert new loan leads through field sales, referrals, and personal networks
	Market Baselenders&rsquo; loan products to prospective customers
	Guide customers through the loan application process
	Build and maintain strong customer relationships
	Monitor customer repayments and support recovery efforts where necessary
	Meet monthly sales and portfolio performance targets
	Submit weekly activity and performance reports.


Requirements


	OND, HND, or BSc Degree in any discipline
	Minimum of 2 years of experience in sales, loan marketing, or financial services
	Strong communication, negotiation, and relationship management skills
	Self-motivated and target-driven
	Ability to work independently and in the field
	Basic understanding of loan products and customer risk assessment.


What We Offer


	Competitive base salary - N200,000 - N250,000 monthly.
	Attractive commission structure with strong earning potential
	Performance bonuses for maintaining a healthy portfolio
	Career growth opportunities within the organization
	Professional work environment in Ikoyi, Lagos.


Method of Application&nbsp;
Interested and qualified candidates should send their CV to: career@baselendersng.com using &quot;Relationship Officer &ndash; Application&quot; as the subject of the mail.

Note


	Baselenders Limited is an equal opportunity employer.
	All applications will be treated with strict confidentiality.

Relationship Officer Job at Baselenders Limited




        
    

        
        Baselenders Limited is a Lagos-based licensed money lender regulated by the Lagos State Government. We provide fast, responsible, and professionally structured credit to SMEs, professionals, and individuals across Lagos State.

We are recruiting to fill the position below:

Job Position: Relationship Officer

Job Location: Lagos
Employment Type: Full-time

Summary
     

        



     (adsbygoogle = window.adsbygoogle || []).push({});
    
    




	We are looking for smart, energetic, and result-driven Relationship Officers to join our growing team.
	If you are passionate about sales, relationship management, and earning based on performance, this opportunity is for you.


Key Responsibilities


	Generate and convert new loan leads through field sales, referrals, and personal networks
	Market Baselenders’ loan products to prospective customers
	Guide customers through the loan application process
	Build and maintain strong customer relationships
	Monitor customer repayments and support recovery efforts where necessary
	Meet monthly sales and portfolio performance targets
	Submit weekly activity and performance reports.


Requirements


	OND, HND, or BSc Degree in any discipline
	Minimum of 2 years of experience in sales, loan marketing, or financial services
	Strong communication, negotiation, and relationship management skills
	Self-motivated and target-driven
	Ability to work independently and in the field
	Basic understanding of loan products and customer risk assessment.


What We Offer


	Competitive base salary - N200,000 - N250,000 monthly.
	Attractive commission structure with strong earning potential
	Performance bonuses for maintaining a healthy portfolio
	Career growth opportunities within the organization
	Professional work environment in Ikoyi, Lagos.


Method of Application 
Interested and qualified candidates should send their CV to: [email protected] using "Relationship Officer – Application" as the subject of the mail.

Note


	Baselenders Limited is an equal opportunity employer.
	All applications will be treated with strict confidentiality.
    

    

        Click here to Apply

Administrative Assistant Job at Odixcity Consulting




        
    

        
        Odixcity Consulting is an International Hr consulting and procurement firm. With expertise in Recruitment & Selection, Performance management, Training & Development, Compensation and benefits as well as Outsourcing of goods and services for organizations.

We are recruiting to fill the position below:

Job Position: Administrative Assistant

Job Location: Port Harcourt, Rivers
Employment Type: Full-time

Job Summary
     

        



     (adsbygoogle = window.adsbygoogle || []).push({});
    
    




	We are seeking a highly organized, proactive, and experienced Administrative Assistant to support our operations in Port Harcourt.
	The successful candidate will ensure the smooth running of daily administrative functions, providing exceptional support to management and technical teams.
	This position requires industry experience within the oil & gas or construction sectors and the ability to travel when required.


Key Responsibilities


	Office Management: Oversee daily office operations, maintaining a clean and organized environment.
	Documentation & Reporting: Prepare, edit, and proofread correspondence, invoices, reports, and memos. Maintain organized physical and digital filing systems.
	Logistics Coordination: Manage travel arrangements, hotel bookings, and vehicle logistics for personnel.
	Project Support: Assist Project Managers with site documentation, contractor tracking, and procurement records.
	Communication: Act as the primary point of contact, handling incoming calls, emails, and correspondence professionally.
	Inventory Control: Manage office supplies and equipment, ensuring timely replenishment.
	Scheduling: Coordinate meetings, appointments, and project schedules.


Requirements & Qualifications


	Education: OND/HND/B.Sc in Business Administration or a related field.
	Experience: Proven work experience (minimum 2–3 years) as an Admin Assistant specifically within theOil & Gas or Construction industry.
	Location/Mode: Must be based in Port Harcourt or willing to relocate immediately. This is afull-time, on-siterole,.
	Interview Process: Must be willing to attend aphysical interviewin Port Harcourt.
	Travel Requirement: Candidate must be willing to travel to project sites when required.
	Skills: Proficiency in Microsoft Office Suite (MS Excel, Word, PowerPoint).
	Attributes: Strong organizational, multitasking, and communication skills with high attention to detail.


Salary
N250,000 monthly.

Method of Application 
Interested and qualified candidates should send their CV and cover letter to [email protected] using "Administrative Assistant - Port Harcourt" as the subject of the email.

Note: Only shortlisted candidates will be contacted for a physical interview.

{
  "@context": "https://schema.org",
  "@type": "JobPosting",
  "title": "Customer Service Representative",
  "description": "Odixcity Consulting is an International Hr consulting and procurement firm. With expertise in Recruitment &amp; Selection, Performance management, Training &amp; Development, Compensation and benefits as well as Outsourcing of goods and services for organizations.

We are recruiting to fill the position below:

Job Position: Customer Service Representative

Job Location: Port Harcourt, Rivers
Employment Type: Full-time

Job Summary


	We are seeking a dedicated, empathetic, and detail-oriented Customer Service Representative to join our team in Port Harcourt.
	The successful candidate will act as the primary point of contact for our customers, providing exceptional service via phone, email, and social media.
	The ideal candidate must have a proven track record of using CRM tools to manage interactions, resolve complaints, and enhance customer satisfaction.


Responsibilities


	Customer Support: Respond promptly to customer inquiries, complaints, and requests professionally via phone, WhatsApp, and email.
	CRM Management: Utilize CRM software (e.g., Zendesk, HubSpot, Zoho) to document, track, and update all customer interactions, feedback, and resolutions.
	Issue Resolution: Resolve customer complaints effectively, troubleshoot issues, and provide timely solutions to ensure high retention rates.
	Data Maintenance: Maintain accurate and up-to-date customer records, including contact details and transaction history.
	Collaboration: Coordinate with sales and logistics teams to expedite service delivery and resolve complex queries.
	Reporting:Gather customer feedback and generate reports on common issues to assist in improving service delivery.


Job Requirements


	Education: HND or Bachelor&rsquo;s Degree in Marketing, Business Administration, or related fields.
	Experience: Minimum of 1&ndash;3 years of proven experience in a customer service or support role.
	CRM Skills: Mandatory experience using CRM toolsto log interactions and manage customer accounts.
	Location: Must be a resident of Port Harcourt.
	Skills: Excellent verbal and written communication skills (English).
	
		Strong problem-solving abilities and emotional intelligence.
		Proficiency in Microsoft Office Suite (Excel, Word).
		Ability to work in a fast-paced environment and manage high call volumes.
	
	


Salary: N150,000 monthly.

Method of Application&nbsp;
Interested and qualified candidates should send their CV and cover letter to: cvs@odixcityconsulting.com.ng using &quot;Customer Service Representative - Port Harcourt&quot; as the subject of the email.

Note: Only shortlisted candidates will be contacted.",

Customer Service Representative Job at Odixcity Consulting




        
    

        
        Odixcity Consulting is an International Hr consulting and procurement firm. With expertise in Recruitment & Selection, Performance management, Training & Development, Compensation and benefits as well as Outsourcing of goods and services for organizations.

We are recruiting to fill the position below:

Job Position: Customer Service Representative

Job Location: Port Harcourt, Rivers
Employment Type: Full-time

Job Summary
     

        



     (adsbygoogle = window.adsbygoogle || []).push({});
    
    




	We are seeking a dedicated, empathetic, and detail-oriented Customer Service Representative to join our team in Port Harcourt.
	The successful candidate will act as the primary point of contact for our customers, providing exceptional service via phone, email, and social media.
	The ideal candidate must have a proven track record of using CRM tools to manage interactions, resolve complaints, and enhance customer satisfaction.


Responsibilities


	Customer Support: Respond promptly to customer inquiries, complaints, and requests professionally via phone, WhatsApp, and email.
	CRM Management: Utilize CRM software (e.g., Zendesk, HubSpot, Zoho) to document, track, and update all customer interactions, feedback, and resolutions.
	Issue Resolution: Resolve customer complaints effectively, troubleshoot issues, and provide timely solutions to ensure high retention rates.
	Data Maintenance: Maintain accurate and up-to-date customer records, including contact details and transaction history.
	Collaboration: Coordinate with sales and logistics teams to expedite service delivery and resolve complex queries.
	Reporting:Gather customer feedback and generate reports on common issues to assist in improving service delivery.


Job Requirements


	Education: HND or Bachelor’s Degree in Marketing, Business Administration, or related fields.
	Experience: Minimum of 1–3 years of proven experience in a customer service or support role.
	CRM Skills: Mandatory experience using CRM toolsto log interactions and manage customer accounts.
	Location: Must be a resident of Port Harcourt.
	Skills: Excellent verbal and written communication skills (English).
	
		Strong problem-solving abilities and emotional intelligence.
		Proficiency in Microsoft Office Suite (Excel, Word).
		Ability to work in a fast-paced environment and manage high call volumes.
	
	


Salary: N150,000 monthly.

Method of Application 
Interested and qualified candidates should send their CV and cover letter to: [email protected] using "Customer Service Representative - Port Harcourt" as the subject of the email.

Note: Only shortlisted candidates will be contacted.    

    

        Click here to Apply

{
  "@context": "https://schema.org",
  "@type": "JobPosting",
  "title": "Business Development Officer",
  "description": "Arlington Insurance Brokers Limited is a NAICOM-licensed, fast-growing insurance brokerage firm based in Lagos, Nigeria. Since our founding in 2021, we have achieved 2&times; year-on-year revenue growth driven by a relentless focus on client service, innovation, and market
expansion. We are now entering an exciting new phase and we need exceptional talent to help us grow.

Arlington Insurance Brokers Limited is a fast-growing, NAICOM-licensed insurance brokerage firm committed to delivering innovative insurance solutions and exceptional client service across Nigeria.

We are recruiting to fill the position below:

Job Position: Business Development Officer
Job Location: Ikoyi, Lagos
Employment Type: Full-time

Job Summary


	We are looking for a commercially driven Business Development Executive to lead the growth of our public sector and corporate accounts portfolio.
	This role is ideal for a strong relationship builder with experience in insurance or financial services and a proven ability to win and manage high-value accounts.


Key Responsibilities


	Identify and develop new business opportunities across public and private sector organizations
	Build and manage strong relationships with corporate clients, MDAs, and government agencies
	Drive adoption of Arlington&rsquo;s insurance and premium finance solutions
	Prepare and present proposals, tenders, and client presentations
	Develop and maintain a strong sales pipeline and meet revenue targets
	Represent the company at industry events, networking forums, and client meetings
	Provide regular pipeline and business development reports to management


Requirements


	Bachelor&rsquo;s degree in Business, Finance, Insurance, or a related field
	3&ndash;5 years of experience in business development, sales, or insurance marketing
	Proven experience managing corporate or public sector accounts
	Strong understanding of insurance products and the Nigerian insurance market
	Excellent communication, negotiation, and presentation skills
	Strong professional network within corporate or government sectors is an advantage
	Self-motivated, target-driven, and commercially minded
	Professional insurance certifications such as CIIN or ACIIN are an added advantage.


Salary
N400,000 - N500,000 per month.&nbsp;

What We Offer:


	Competitive salary package
	Attractive commission and performance-based incentives
	Career growth and professional development opportunities
	Direct exposure to leadership and strategic business initiatives
	Supportive and performance-driven work environment.&nbsp;


Method of Application&nbsp;
Interested and qualified candidates should send their CV and a concise cover letter to: hr@arlingtoninsurancebroker.com using &quot;Business Development ExecutiveApplication &ndash; [Your Name]&quot; as the subject of the mail.",
